This classification places Lytoneuron crenulans within the division Pteridophyta, which consists of vascular plants that reproduce via spores. Lytoneuron crenulans is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. The combination of its classification and unique characteristics sets Lytoneuron crenulans apart from other plant species.
